name: n8n:create-instance-ai-eval
tagline: Authors, calibrates, and pushes n8n Instance AI workflow eval cases (build/behaviour/credential/seeded) to LangTracer suites.
verdict: Strong, highly actionable eval-authoring procedure with clear autonomy gates, calibration rules, and extensive failure-path/harness-limitation guidance. Weak spots: name 'n8n:create-instance-ai-eval' breaks kebab-case naming (H02), no version/changelog signal (H08), and SKILL.md runs long (690 lines/43KB) with dense inline reference material that could be.

highlights.summary: 690-line SKILL.md keeps some bulk inline (harness-limitations catalog, sizing table) despite splitting case-shapes/sourcing-cases/running-evals out.
name 'n8n:create-instance-ai-eval' contains a colon, violating kebab-case ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$.
SKILL.md is 690 lines / ~43KB, above the ~500-line/25KB budget but under 2x.
